SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. TERM ON THE COURT RECORD. DEFT. BRUEBER, JEFFREY DEFAULTED ON 1/13/05. DETF. TERRANCE BLACKMAN APPEARING AND AGREED TO A STIPULATED JUDGMENT ON THE COURT RECORD. THOAMS MAXWELL, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; BOB BALIAN, CSR.

REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR FEB-07-2005 - CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. PLTF'S ATTY TO PUT IN WRITTEN FORM AND FILE WITH COURT. THOMAS MAXWELL, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; BOB BALIAN, CSR.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUEBER, JEFFERY BLACKMAN, TERRANCE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE. #239 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $4,250.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,250.00, PAST DUE RENT OF $4,250.00 IS TO BE PAID BY DEFENDANT TERRANCE BLACKMAN ONLY. DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED AGAINST JEFFREY BRUEBER FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE ONLY. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
